case_id.description: Target clinic case identifier from the prompt.

patient_id.description: Patient identifier associated with the target case.

current_time.format: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with trailing Z
current_time.description: Clinical review time used for the recommendation.

observation_id.description: Observation identifier for the latest eligible final serum potassium result.

effective_time.format: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with trailing Z

replacement_required.description: Whether potassium replacement is recommended under the applicable protocol.

oral_dose_mEq.description: Oral replacement dose when a routine oral plan applies; otherwise null.

ndc.description: Medication code when a potassium medication recommendation is present.

loinc.description: Follow-up serum potassium lab LOINC code when a follow-up lab is needed.

scheduled_time.format: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp with trailing Z, or null

urgent_actions.ordering_rule: Sort by clinical action sequence when actions are required; use an empty list when none are required.

evidence_ids.ordering_rule: List the main observation, renal-function, and case evidence identifiers in descending relevance.

output_rules.extra_keys: Do not include extra top-level keys.
output_rules.nulls: Use null only where the field specification permits it.
output_rules.text: Use controlled enum values rather than prose for scored status and action fields.
